ground_truth.basis: Authored force-required-for-motion misconception and poll misses

events.speaker: Dr. Patel
events.text: Can an object move when the net force is zero?

events.speaker: Owen
events.text: No, it needs a force or it stops.

events.speaker: Maya
events.text: I'm not sure. Moving means a forward force, right?

events.question: Zero net force permits constant velocity

events.speaker: Sam
events.text: This is confusing because no force sounds like no motion.
